'''Ugan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Detainer CC-2200/Legends|Detainer CC-2200 Interdictor Cruiser]] that served in the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] over [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]] rammed into his ship on a suicide run.

{{Char-stub}}
